svg.title: Sequence Diagram 3 — Create MTX Item (Factory Method Pattern)
svg.desc: Sequence diagram showing MTXItemFactory.Create() dispatching construction of concrete MTXItem subclasses, replacing direct new() calls in Program.cs.
svg.text: Sequence diagram 3 — Create MTX item (UC seeding, Factory Method pattern)
for each item in seed catalogue
10: item persisted — caller never uses concrete type
